series: Proceedings of the  Traveling Workshop-cum-Field Visit to Benchmark  Watersheds  27 August to 12 September 2000
publisher: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
note:
This workshop was organized with the active support of several organizations/institutions.
 Some of the notable ones are: Central Research Institute for Dryland Agriculture (CRIDA);
 Jawaharlal Nehru Krishi Vishwa Vidyalaya (JNKVV); Indian Institute of Soil Science (IISS);
 BAIF Development Research Foundation (BAIF); Khon Kaen University (KKU); Royal Thai
 Department of Agriculture; and Vietnam Agricultural Science Institute (VASI).
 Many individuals contributed to the success of the workshop. We sincerely thank Dr T D Long
 for inaugurating the workshop. Thanks are particularly due to Drs S M Virmani, P Pathak, Piara
 Singh, Y S Chauhan, and A Ramakrishna who so efficiently organized all the arrangements for
 the workshop. M/s K N V Satyanarayana and Y Prabhakar Rao undertook the various
 secretarial tasks graciously. We sincerely thank VASI and KKU for the overall local support
 provided for the workshop and its outcome. Ms Sheila Vijayakumar has provided invaluable
 assistance by editing this manuscript. We are indebted to Dr K Sailaja for summarizing reports
 and the evaluation forms; and to Mr K N V Satyanarayana for formatting and page-setting the
 manuscript.
title: Improving Management of Natural Resources for Sustainable Rainfed Agriculture
